bot.title: I don't have permission to %action%!
bot.description: I need the **%permission%** permission to continue.

user.title: You don't have permission to %action%!
user.description: You need the **%permission%** permission to use this command.

create_user.created: 🚀 %user_mention% your account has been successfully created! You can now use economy commands!
create_user.fail: 🚫 %user_mention% your account could not be created. Please try again later!
create_user.already: 🚫 %user_mention% you already have an account! Use the command ``/balance`` to see your balance.

botStats.title: 📊 Koxik Bot Stats
botStats.errorFetching: ❌ An error occurred while fetching bot stats.

userNotFound.title: User Not Found
userNotFound.description: User **%user%** doesn't have an account in the system. They need to use an economy command first.

success.title: Deposit Completed
success.description: You successfully deposited **%amount%** pollens to your bank!

error.title: Deposit Error
error.userNotFound: User not found! Use an economy command first.
error.insufficientFunds: You don't have enough funds in your wallet!
error.failed: ❌ Failed to deposit. Try again, you got this! 💪

confirmation.title: Transfer Confirmation
confirmation.description: **%payer%** wants to transfer **%amount%** pollens to **%receiver%** via **%method%**

success.title: Transaction Completed
success.robbedDescription: Unfortunately, **%stolen%** pollens were stolen during the transfer! 😱

error.title: Transaction Error
error.insufficientFunds: You don't have enough funds to pay **%amount%** pollens.
error.pending: %payer% wants to pay %receiver% %amount% via %method%. Do you accept?
error.notReceiver: Only the receiver can accept or decline this transaction.
error.receiverNotFound: User **%user%** does not exist in the system. They need to run an economy command first.

expired.title: Transaction Expired
expired.message: ⏰ Transaction between **%payer%** and **%receiver%** expired. Try again!

bonus.title: Streak Bonus!
bonus.description: 🎉 You earned **%bonus%** extra pollens for claiming daily for **%streak%** consecutive days!

streak.title: Active Streak
streak.description: 🔥 **%streak%** consecutive days! **%remaining%** days left for the next bonus!

cooldown.title: Daily on Cooldown
cooldown.description: You already claimed your daily reward today!

error.title: Error Claiming Daily
error.failed: ❌ Error claiming daily. Bad luck! Try later.

leaderboard.title: Richest Users Ranking
leaderboard.description: Users with the most pollens on the server!
leaderboard.empty: No users found in the ranking.

error.title: Operation Error
error.generic: Something went wrong. Try again later! 🥲

user.notFound: ❌ User not found in the system!

confirm_prompt: You sure you want ban **%user%**? This is final.
responses.confirm_button: Yes, i want send they to trash! ⚒️
responses.error_cannot_ban_self: You can not ban youself, pls not try :/
responses.error_bot_higher_role: My role not high enough to ban this user. (╯︵╰,)
responses.error_higher_role: You no have permission/hierarchie to ban this user. ╥﹏╥
responses.error_on_ban: Oops, something wrong ban, try again later. (;﹏;)
responses.timeout: Time out. If changed mind, run command again :3

mine.no_backpack: ❌ You don't have a backpack or tools.
mine.pickaxe_broken_desc: Your pickaxe broke during mining! Your ores were saved to your backpack.
mine.lava_jump_success: 💨 You jumped over the lava successfully!
mine.lava_jump_fail: 🔥 You burned yourself in the lava! (-2 durability)
mine.choose_loot_action: Choose what to do with your ores:
mine.loot_saved_desc: Your ores were added to your backpack.
mine.loot_burned_desc: You destroyed all your ores... why did you do that?

start.alreadyStarted: You already started your journey and have your starter pickaxe!
start.starterTransactionDesc: Started the journey and received the Wooden Pickaxe
start.success: Your journey has begun! You received a **Wooden Pickaxe** to start mining!

responses.error: ❌ Failed to clear messages. Make sure they are not older than 14 days.

invite.title: 📨 **Koxik Invite**
invite.description: Add Koxik to your server and enjoy the best of moderation and fun!

info.title: 🤖 **Koxik, Your multipurpose bot**
description: Hi! I'm Koxik, an essential bot for you and your server!

skin.invalid_nick: This nickname is invalid or forbidden.

view.noAccount: The user does not have an account. Use %command%
view.aboutDefault: Koxik is a cool bot... bla bla bla (/profile aboutme - To edit!)

automod.no_permission:
I don't have permission to create automod rules!
I need the **Manage Server** permission to create automod rules.

main.title: # Bot Shop!
main.description: The bot shop offers various items for you (within the bot), just make a selection using the select menu below to select an item category!

select.roleplay_description: Here you can buy (with bot coins) items for the roleplay (or fictional life) category commands by clicking the select menu below!
select.not_found_hint: ### Hmmmm, still didn't find what you wanted?
select.not_found_hint2: If you didn't find what you wanted, try looking in another category, maybe you'll find it!

error.no_account_description: You don't have an account in the bot! Use %command% to create your account first.
error.item_not_found_description: This item is not currently available in the shop.
error.insufficient_funds_description:
You don't have enough Pollens to buy **%item_name%**!

💰 **Price:** %item_price% Pollens
💳 **Your balance:** %current_balance% Pollens
💸 **Missing:** %missing% Pollens
error.generic_error_description: An error occurred while processing your purchase. Try again later.
error.transaction_failed_description: Your purchase could not be completed. Your balance was not debited. Try again!

confirmation.title: 🛍️ Confirm purchase
confirmation.description:
You are about to buy:

**%item_name%**
%item_description%

💰 **Price:** %item_price% Pollens
💳 **Current balance:** %current_balance% Pollens
💸 **New balance:** %new_balance% Pollens

Are you sure you want to continue?

success.title: Purchase completed successfully!
success.description:
You bought **%item_name%** for %item_price% Pollens!

💳 **New balance:** %new_balance% Pollens

Thanks for your purchase! 💖

cancelled.title: Purchase cancelled
cancelled.description: Your purchase was cancelled. Your Pollens were not debited.

description.common: A simple lootbox with basic rewards.
description.rare: A rare lootbox containing valuable items.
description.epic: An epic lootbox filled with powerful rewards.
